rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies a key inconsistency (non-stationarity argument) and suggests a fix (reframing as a limitation).
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (FrugalML) but doesn't fully map against other relevant works in the field.
rationale.R1.7: Flags missing citations for specific prior works on adaptive routing and climate emulation.
rationale.RX.1: Clearly identifies uncertainty around the generalization of the router to future climate scenarios.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there are minor deviations in focus (e.g., discussion of intermediate baselines).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions identified; highlights potential harmful patterns in the original work.
rationale.RX.5: Provides some traceability for major rewrites but lacks detailed annotation for all changes.
